product: Run a subset of job tasks with their dependencies ​
tagline: June 30, 2026 When you run a subset of a job's tasks, you can now expand your selection to include each task's dependencies.
what_it_does: June 30, 2026 When you run a subset of a job's tasks, you can now expand your selection to include each task's dependencies. Add the + modifier to a task key to also run its upstream tasks ( +my task ), its downstream tasks ( my task+ ), or both ( +my task+ ).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: June 30, 2026 When
